🚀 Version 5.9 now finalizes performance-based challenges, era-locked bosses, buff/debuff integration with coursework, and the living legend system.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 6.0 – Finalizing Performance Handicaps, Secret Alignments, XP Leader Benefits, and The Hidden Final Challenge


🚀 This iteration introduces structured handicaps for performance challenges, clarifies the secret alignment system, ensures XP caps apply to all unlocks, and develops a practical reward system for the top XP earners.

📜 1. Performance-Based Challenges – Handicaps & Penalties for Opting Out
